title: Resize table so we can fit more than 2 horizontally
excerpt: I was hoping I could have (at least) 3 tables in a view across horizontally, but that ability to resize the table narrow enough to fit 3 has not been enabled. 2 tables seem to be the limit.  It doesn’t matter if it is in…

posts.author: jland (Jeff)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was hoping I could have (at least) 3 tables in a view across horizontally, but that ability to resize the table narrow enough to fit 3 has not been enabled. 2 tables seem to be the limit. It doesn’t matter if it is in standard view, or in a separate dashboard. There have been other topics created on this, and since closed out with no resolution. I am hoping the dev team can revisit this as it seems like it would be an easy fix as many other views/widgets can be on a view/dashboard and show 3 or more horizontally across the screen.
Thank you.
